title: Money Pilot: #FintechUK #UKProperty #PropTech #CommercialMortgages | Product Hunt
excerpt: Money Pilot is an FCA-regulated (FRN: 968705) fintech platform that disrupts the UK commercial lending market by removing the traditional 1–2% broker fee. The Problem: Borrowers typically pay thousands in upfront broker fees to access "intermediary-only" lenders. The Solution: A zero-cost comparison engine that connects borrowers to 200+ specialist lenders for bridging loans, commercial mortgages, and development finance.
content_html: Money Pilot is an FCA-regulated (FRN: 968705) fintech platform that disrupts the UK commercial lending market by removing the traditional 1–2% broker fee. The Solution: A zero-cost comparison engine that connects borrowers to 200+ specialist lenders for bridging loans, commercial mortgages, and development finance.

sentences.en: Money Pilot is an FCA-regulated (FRN: 968705) fintech platform that disrupts the UK commercial lending market by removing the traditional 1–2% broker fee.
sentences.zh: Money Pilot 是一个受 FCA 监管（FRN：968705）的金融科技平台，通过取消传统的 1-2% 经纪人费用，颠覆了英国商业贷款市场。

sentences.en: The Problem: Borrowers typically pay thousands in upfront broker fees to access "intermediary-only" lenders.
sentences.zh: 问题：借款人通常要支付数千美元的预付款经纪人费用才能获得“仅限中介”的贷款机构。

sentences.en: The Solution: A zero-cost comparison engine that connects borrowers to 200+ specialist lenders for bridging loans, commercial mortgages, and development finance.
sentences.zh: 解决方案：零成本比较引擎，将借款人与 200 多家专业贷款人联系起来，提供过渡性贷款、商业抵押贷款和开发融资。

content_html_zh: Money Pilot 是一个受 FCA 监管（FRN：968705）的金融科技平台，通过取消传统的 1-2% 经纪人费用，颠覆了英国商业贷款市场。 问题：借款人通常要支付数千美元的预付款经纪人费用才能获得“仅限中介”的贷款机构。 解决方案：零成本比较引擎，将借款人与 200 多家专业贷款人联系起来，提供过渡性贷款、商业抵押贷款和开发融资。
